nasb.text: Send the tribute lamb to the ruler of the land, From Sela by way of the wilderness to the mountain of the daughter of Zion.

esv.text: Send the lamb to the ruler of the land, from Sela, by way of the desert, to the mount of the daughter of Zion.

cnv.text: 你們要把羊羔送給那地的掌權者， 從西拉經過曠野，送到錫安居民的山。

ccb.text: 摩押人从西拉穿过旷野，来到锡安城的山， 把羊羔献给那里的掌权者。

csbs.text: 你们当从西拉经过旷野， 到锡安城的山， 把羊羔送给那地的管辖者！
